diagrams.title: Process State Transition Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the five states of a process and valid transitions between them
elements: Arrows: New→Ready, Ready→Running, Running→Ready, Running→Waiting, Waiting→Ready, Running→Terminated
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process lifecycle and valid state changes in operating systems

diagrams.title: Process Control Block Structure
diagrams.description: Data structure containing all information about a process
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how OS maintains information about each process

diagrams.title: CPU Scheduling Queue Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how processes move through different queues in CPU scheduling
elements: Ready Queue (processes in memory ready for CPU)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding CPU scheduling concepts and queue management
